Alex ran the test batch of court transcripts through the standard model. The base model sees a 50-page transcript and tries to find the most important sentences. The LoRA layer is similar to giving the base Pegasus model a Law Degree.
The LoRA version of the Pegasus-LoRA model is performing better than the standard model. It's lightweight, fast, and it's ready for the beta.
